alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices scaling global commercial operations and managing transformation programs with cross-functional stakeholder coordination
alignments.job_requirement: Überwachung der Einhaltung betrieblicher Standards und Regelwerke

alignments.candidate_evidence: Demonstrated experience in global commercial operations requiring coordination across internal teams and external partners; strategic programs leadership involves stakeholder management
alignments.job_requirement: Kommunikation und Abstimmung mit Behörden sowie internen Stakeholdern

alignments.candidate_evidence: Transformation program leadership and business operations background suggest process improvement and issue resolution experience, but no direct evidence of operational troubleshooting in rail/transportation context
alignments.job_requirement: Analyse, Nachbereitung und Aufarbeitung betrieblicher Unregelmäßigkeiten inkl. Ursachenanalyse

gaps.gap: No railway operations, train safety, or transportation-specific background; role requires mastery of German railway regulations (Eisenbahnbetriebsordnung) and European rail standards
gaps.mitigation: Candidate brings operational standards and compliance mindset from tech environments, but would require substantial domain-specific onboarding and formal railway certifications (Triebfahrzeugführer equivalent)

gaps.gap: No Triebfahrzeugführer (train driver) certification or equivalent rail operations credential; JD lists completed apprenticeship as baseline qualification
gaps.mitigation: Would need to obtain formal German railway driver certification or equivalent operational credential before stepping into safety inspector role

gaps.gap: Limited hands-on operational inspection, audit, and compliance enforcement experience; role emphasizes direct field supervision and on-train inspections
gaps.mitigation: Strategy and operations background involves process definition but not field-based compliance auditing; candidate's strength is transformation design, not operational execution oversight

gaps.gap: No demonstrated familiarity with German employment law, rail safety regulations, or authority coordination specific to German/EU rail sector
gaps.mitigation: Candidate is German-native speaker, which aids communication and cultural fit, but requires legal and regulatory domain learning

hard_blockers.evidence: JD states 'Abgeschlossene Ausbildung als Triebfahrzeugführer' (Completed apprenticeship/training as train driver) as a core requirement. This is a mandatory credential for safety inspection in German rail operations. Candidate has no background in rail operations, train driving, or equivalent transportation safety certifications.

output.level_rationale: Role requires 3–5 years of prior rail operations or equivalent safety/compliance experience as a baseline (train-driver apprenticeship completion); Safety Inspector title in regulated rail context suggests individual contributor or junior supervisory scope. Mid-career (L4) is a reasonable estimate given operational oversight scope, but company size and organizational reporting line are unstated in JD, moderating confidence.
output.summary: Safety Inspector at FlixTrain (German railway operator) is a specialized operational compliance and field-audit role requiring German train-driver certification, mastery of rail safety regulations, and hands-on train inspection—fundamentally different from strategy, operations, and transformation work. Candidate brings strong stakeholder management and process-design background but has no railway operations, safety inspection, or rail-specific technical credentials. Hard blocker: mandatory Triebfahrzeugführer apprenticeship certification is not met.
uncertainties: Company size and stage (Flix parent company structure) not stated; FlixTrain scale and organizational hierarchy unclear
Reporting line and management scope not specified in JD
Whether role involves people management or is purely individual-contributor field inspection
Candidate's willingness or ability to obtain German rail driver certification unclear from profile
